description: Rainbow CTI integration for Zoho CRM — embedded softphone, click-to-call, call logging, and recording links

settings.label: Zoho Data Center

settings.label: Call Log Subject Prefix

prerequisites: Zoho CRM Professional or Enterprise plan
Rainbow CPaaS account with telephony enabled
Admin access to Zoho CRM for OAuth setup
notes: Supports all 6 Zoho data centers. Uses OAuth2 with offline access for token refresh.
